name: Arif Rahman
bio: We shared a dorm room during university and later worked on a small startup idea together. Arif now works as a backend engineer and still loves debating tech trends late at night.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: We met in high school during debate competitions. Nusrat is now a journalist and often shares insightful stories about social issues and culture.

name: Mahmudul Hasan
bio: A colleague from my first job who became my regular gym partner. We motivate each other to stay fit and often discuss career growth during workouts.

name: Farhana Kabir
bio: My cousin who lives in Chittagong. We used to spend every Eid together growing up. She now runs a small handmade crafts business from home.

name: Tariq Ahmed
bio: Met during a group trip to Bandarban. Tariq is passionate about landscape photography and often travels to capture nature’s beauty.

name: Sadia Islam
bio: We grew up in the same neighborhood and spent countless afternoons playing cricket in the street. Sadia now works as a primary school teacher.

name: Rafiul Karim
bio: We connected through an open-source project and later met at a developer meetup in Dhaka. Rafiul is deeply involved in community mentoring and tech talks.

name: Mim Chowdhury
bio: We met at a local book club and bonded over our love for historical fiction. Mim runs a small café and is always experimenting with new coffee recipes.
